programNotificationTemplates.name: Immunization visit reminder
programNotificationTemplates.messageTemplate: Dear A{w75KJ2mc4zz}. This to remind you that you have an upcoming visit in V{days_until_due_date} days for your second immunization visit at V{program_stage_name} health facility. Please ensure to bring your immunization card with you.

programNotificationTemplates.name: Enrollment notification
programNotificationTemplates.messageTemplate: A new enrollment was registered for V{program_name} for A{w75KJ2mc4zz} A{zDhUuAYrxNC} at health facility V{org_unit_name} at V{current_date}.

programNotificationTemplates.name: Immunization visit missed notification
programNotificationTemplates.messageTemplate: Dear A{w75KJ2mc4zz}. It seems that you forgot to visit V{org_unit_name} for your second immunization visit. Please come at your earliest convenience.

programIndicators.name: Measles + Yellow fever doses low infant weight
programIndicators.shortName: Measles + Yellow fever doses low infant weight

programIndicators.name: Weight gain(in g) between birth and last postnatal
programIndicators.description: The average number of grams the baby has gained through the postnatal period. Only counted among the babies that has completed the postnatal period.

programIndicators.name: Health immunization score
programIndicators.description: Sum of BCG doses, measles doses and yellow fever doses. If Apgar score over or equal to 2, multiply by 2.

programRuleActions.content: If the apgar score is below zero, an explanation must be provided.
It is suggested that an explanation is provided when the Apgar score is below 4

programRules.name: Ask for comment for low apgar
programRules.description: Show warrning if Apgar is between 0 and 4 and there is no comment provided.

programRules.name: Demand comment if apgar is under zero
programRules.description: If Apgar is provided as being under zero and there is no comment for the anomaly, show an error message.

dataElements.name: MCH Visit Comment
dataElements.description: Free text comment used to put additional information for a visit.

dataElements.name: MCH Apgar Score
dataElements.description: Apgar is a quick test performed on a baby at 1 and 5 minutes after birth. The 1-minute score determines how well the baby tolerated the birthing process. The 5-minute score tells the doctor how well the baby is doing outside the mother's womb.
